description: List of thirty-two names with Coptic numerals (recipients of loaves of bread), for example, “the son of little Sesame.” A Maghribi scribe is recorded as receiving ten loaves and the water carrier Wafa two loaves. (S. D. Goitein, A Mediterranean Society, 2:463) EMS
tags: poverty, Coptic numerals, recipients, communal, charity, bread
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
